steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to "indicate the title of a novel that won a Nebula Award." The correct choice must name the specific novel and link it to winning the award.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘One of Samuel Delany's novels was among the best works of science fiction published in the US.’: No novel title is named, and the Nebula Award is not mentioned by name. Fails both requirements. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Samuel Delany is an award-winning US writer known for his science fiction.’: No novel title, no specific award named. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘*Babel-17*, by Samuel Delany, won a Nebula Award in 1967.’: Names the novel Babel-17 and explicitly states it won a Nebula Award. Satisfies both requirements. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘Samuel Delany published a science fiction novel in 1966.’: No novel title given, and no award mentioned. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
